name: lark-cli
description: The official Lark/Feishu CLI tool and AI Agent Skills package maintained by the Larksuite team. It seamlessly connects Claude Code and custom AI agents with core collaborative domains including Messenger, Docs, Base, Sheets, Calendar, Mail, Tasks, and Meetings. Use this skill whenever your AI agent needs to programmatically read or write Feishu/Lark documents, update cloud spreadsheets, send instant IM messages, manage team calendars, or automate enterprise office workflows.
detail:
## Lark/Feishu CLI & Agent Skills

Official enterprise-grade automation suite empowering AI agents to interact with the entire Larksuite ecosystem natively.

### Core Features
- **Unified Office Access**: Full lifecycle control over Docs, Sheets, and Base databases with 200+ specialized commands.
- **Agent-Ready Design**: Includes 20+ fine-tuned AI Agent Skills optimizing multi-turn tool calling for modern LLMs.
- **Secure Workspace Integration**: Streamlined authentication protocols across enterprise tenants for instant chat, task tracking, and email routing.

### System Configuration
Requires an internal app credential (App ID and App Secret) from the Feishu/Lark Open Platform to establish secure runtime token exchanges.

name: github-cli
description: The official GitHub command-line tool (gh) and agent extension. It brings repositories, issues, pull requests, secrets, and GitHub Actions workflows directly into Claude Code and custom AI agent execution contexts. Use this skill when your agent needs to clone repos, check CI/CD run status, create pull requests, review code diffs, or triage issues programmatically.
detail:
## GitHub CLI Tool & Agent Skill

Official GitHub automation layer providing seamless terminal and API instrumentation for repositories and workflows.

### Core Features
- **PR & Issue Lifecycle**: Create, view, merge, and close issues or pull requests directly from conversational inputs.
- **Actions Automation**: Monitor GitHub Actions workflow status, trigger rerun dispatches, and download artifact logs.
- **Secure Credentials Matrix**: Authenticates natively via OAuth tokens to securely interact with private and enterprise organizations.

commands: # 1. 跨平台安装 GitHub 官方独立 CLI 工具核心（根据你的本地操作系统选择对应的执行命令）：

sudo mkdir -p -m 755 /etc/apt/keyrings && wget -qO- https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg | sudo tee /etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg > /dev/null && sudo chmod go+r /etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.di/github-cli.list > /dev/null && sudo apt update && sudo apt install gh -y
# 2. 全平台统一执行账户登录与安全授信以授权本地 Agent：
